MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERNCE):
Atty. DAVID A. HARVEY, Esq. of Law Offices of David Arthur Harvey (Tel: 415-545-8403) for Plaintiffs Marco Farina and Giulia Mazza;
Atty. LEO LAROCCA, Esq. of Niven & Smith, LLP (Tel: 415-981-5451) for Defendants and Cross-Complainants D.P.P.M., Inc. and Nader Kazemi.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS MARCO FARINA AND GIULIA MAZZA's Motion To Compel Defendants Compliance In Accordance With Prior Responses To First Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanction.

The parties previously stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem for this matter at a prior hearing.

The parties provide an update to the Court.

Matter is continued to March 5, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. on the Discovery Calendar for further hearing.

The Court instructs the parties to meet and confer. Plaintiffs may file a supplemental brief no later than February 8, 2021. Defendants/Cross-Complainants may file a response no later than February 23, 2021.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERNCE):
Atty. DAVID A. HARVEY, Esq. of Law Offices of David Arthur Harvey (Tel: 415-545-8403) for Plaintiffs Marco Farina and Giulia Mazza;
Atty. LEO LAROCCA, Esq. of Niven & Smith, LLP (Tel: 415-981-5451) for Defendants and Cross-Complainants D.P.P.M., Inc. and Nader Kazemi.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS MARCO FARINA AND GIULIA MAZZA's Motion To Compel Defendants Compliance In Accordance With Prior Responses To First Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanction.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued.

The Court continues the matter for further hearing to January 22, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. on the Discovery Calendar.

By 1/8/21, defendants are to provide updated responses that comply with CCP Sec. 2031.210-240 and include a privilege a log. Thereafter, plaintiffs are to file an updated separate statement.

Plaintiffs to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at Klgallo@discoveryreferee.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
